channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lakers coach JJ Redick confirms his family's home was lost in the Pacific Palisades fire
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Los Angeles Lakers head coach JJ Redick has confirmed his family lost its home in the raging wildfire in Pacific Palisades earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFL Draft prospect Kyren Lacy wanted for negligent homicide for alleged role in fatal hit-and-run
item.description: Police in Louisiana have issued an arrest warrant for LSU receiver and NFL Draft prospect Kyren Lacy after he allegedly fled a fatal hit-and-run.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers coach JJ Redick, Kentucky Derby-winning jockey Mario Gutierrez lose their homes in wildfires
item.description: Lakers coach JJ Redick and Kentucky Derby-winning jockey Mario Gutierrez are among the sports figures who lost their homes in the Los Angeles wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bucs star Mike Evans receives honor from Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis designated Jan., 10, 2025, Mike Evans Day to honor the Tampa Bay Buccaneers star wide receiver for his on- and off-the-field accomplishments.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles QB Jalen Hurts clears concussion protocol and will start wild-card game against Green Bay
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Out of NFL concussion protocol, Jalen Hurts is ready to roll for the Eagles. With Hurts cleared, the NFC East champion Eagles (14-3) are close to full strength in the starting lineup for their NFC wild-card game Sunday against Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chicago Public Schools paid $390K on do-not-hire sports officials
item.description: Chicago Public Schools paid $390,000 to at least 36 people who were on a do-not-hire list to officiate sporting events.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Eagles' Jalen Hurts says he doesn't remember concussion sideline incident, amid bad year for brain injuries
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles quarterback Jalen Hurts told reporters on Friday that he doesn't remember what happened after he suffered the concussion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees fans who interfered with Mookie Betts during World Series banned from all MLB games
item.description: Major League Baseball has banned two fans who interfered with Los Angeles Dodgers outfielder Mookie Betts during a World Series game at Yankee Stadium from attending any games at big league ballparks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Former LSU receiver Kyren Lacy is being investigated in connection with a fatal auto wreck
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Former LSU receiver Kyren Lacy is under investigation by Louisiana State Police in connection with a vehicle accident in December that killed a 78-year-old man in Lafourche Parish.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Yankees fans who interfered with Mookie Betts in World Series banned from MLB stadiums indefinitely: report
item.description: The two Yankees fans who pinned Mookie Betts' hand down and pried a ball out of his glove have reportedly been indefinitely banned from MLB stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Georgia quarterback Carson Beck says he has committed to Miami for 2025 season
item.description: CORAL GABLES, Fla. (AP) — Carson Beck is heading to Miami. Beck, the now-former Georgia quarterback, has pushed his NFL plans back a year and is committed to play next season at Miami, making the announcement known Friday and becoming another huge transfer portal acquisition for the Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lamar Jackson repeats and Ja’Marr Chase and Justin Jefferson are unanimous choices for AP All-Pro
item.description: Lamar Jackson beat out Josh Allen, and Ja’Marr Chase and Justin Jefferson are unanimous choices for The Associated Press 2024 NFL All-Pro Team. Saquon Barkley received 48 of 50 first-place votes and Patrick Surtain II got 49 from a nationwide panel of media members who regularly cover the league.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake's tumultuous off-season continues with surprise departure
item.description: In the span of one year, Real Salt Lake's high-powered offense has been dismantled, leaving some fans questioning the team's direction and competitive outlook.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Steph Curry, Draymond Green ruled out for Warriors’ game vs. Pacers
item.description: Curry hasn't been playing both legs of back-to-backs since his knee issues began earlier this season.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Penn State QB Drew Allar's late interception helps seal Notre Dame's win in Orange Bowl
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Drew Allar walked to the Penn State sideline with his hands on the top of his head, seemingly aware of where the College Football Playoff semifinal was heading.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Rams' playoff game moved to Arizona as wildfires disrupt sports in Southern California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL moved the Los Angeles Rams’ playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings out of Southern California on Thursday, the biggest of several changes to the sports calendar after days of devastating wildfires in the area.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Comedian Shane Gillis says Nick Saban ‘spazzed on me’ after ESPN on-air appearance
item.description: Shane Gillis, the famous comedian, revealed that legendary college football coach Nick Saban "spazzed on me" after making jokes that he had cheated while at Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Here's how much it will cost to (possibly) see Messi play in San Jose
item.description: (KRON) -- Tickets for the San Jose Earthquakes' home match against Inter Miami went on sale Thursday. The match offers a potential chance for Bay Area soccer fans to see Miami and Argentina star Lionel Messi in action.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: How you can snag $10 tickets to a Utah Hockey Club game
item.description: If you've been eager to be a part of Utah Hockey Club's inaugural season but felt a little overwhelmed by the price of tickets, you may have a chance to snag tickets for just $10 apiece.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls fall to Pacers, 2-game winning streak snapped as longest homestand of season begins
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Bulls were looking to go into their longest homestand of the season on a three-game winning streak. Instead, they'll be trying to start a new one.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears denied permission by Cowboys to interview Mike McCarthy for head coaching job
item.description: CHICAGO — The Bears are casting a wide net in their search for the 18th head coach in franchise history as a critical offseason for the team gets underway. One potential candidate will have to be taken off the interview list — at least for the next several days, if not for good.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Brayden Point scores with 52 seconds to play to lift Lightning to 3-2 win over Hurricanes
item.description: Brayden Point scored with 52 seconds to play and the Tampa Bay Lightning snapped a four-game skid with a 3-2 victory over the Carolina Hurricanes on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Column: Bears need leaders on the line alongside Caleb Williams in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — While the 2024 season was every single bit of a disaster, the Chicago Bears' win over the Green Bay Packers at Lambeau Field Sunday provided a glimmer of hope. It could also double as a springboard into a pivotal offseason.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Zac Blair tries to regain PGA Tour status
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The first full field event of the season on the PGA Tour, the Hawaiian Open, tees off on Thursday. Former BYU star Zac Blair flew out to Hawaii to try to Monday qualify because he no longer has full status on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to trade Gavin Lux to Reds: report
item.description: The post World Series shakeup continues in Los Angeles, as the Dodgers are poised to trade starting second-baseman Gavin Lux to the Cincinnati Reds. As reported by ESPN's Jeff Passan, the Dodgers will send Lux to the Reds in exchange for a future draft pick and outfield prospect Mike Sirota.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Zuckerberg taps UFC President Dana White for Meta's board of directors
item.description: (KRON) -- Meta founder and CEO Mark Zuckerberg rings in the new year with several major personnel announcements. Three high-profile individuals have been named to join Meta's board of directors, including one of the most prominent figures in sports.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Final field for 2025 Farmers Insurance Open in San Diego shaping up
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open is set to take place in San Diego from January 22-25, 2025, featuring a field of major championship winners, past winners, and players with San Diego ties. Tickets went on sale in October.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Lions secure NFC's No. 1 seed, Broncos and Buccaneers clinch the NFL's final two playoff spots
item.description: The road to the Super Bowl in the NFC will go through Motown. The Detroit Lions secured a No. 1 seed with a 31-9 victory over the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego Wave FC announces termination of contract for midfielder Emily van Egmond
item.description: San Diego Wave FC announced Friday that midfielder Emily van Egmond and the club have mutually agreed to terminate her contract.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Dallas, 3-2
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Thomas Harley scored 3:01 into overtime to give the Dallas Stars their fourth straight win, 3-2 against the Utah Hockey Club at American Airlines Center on Saturday. Matt Duchene found Harley near the right post after collecting his own rebound in front of the net.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes get run over by Texas Tech, 93-65
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It may be a long first season in the Big 12 Conference for the Utes basketball team. Darrion Williams scored 19 points with nine assists, Federiko Federiko added 14 points on 7-of-9 shooting — including five dunks — on Saturday, and Texas Tech beat Utah 93-65.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State holds off Fresno State to improve to 14-1
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State is proving to be the team to beat in the Mountain West Conference this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Bulls plan to retire Derrick Rose's jersey next season
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Derrick Rose wasn't sure how he will feel when sees his No. 1 hanging from the rafters. He was still trying to process the news. The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday they plan to retire Rose's jersey sometime next season.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Knicks visit conference foe Chicago Saturday
item.description: New York Knicks (24-11, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (15-19, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Knicks -5.5; over/under is 235.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago takes on New York in Eastern Conference action Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James breaks Michael Jordan's record for 30-point games with his 563rd
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James broke Michael Jordan's NBA record for 30-point games during the Los Angeles Lakers' victory over Atlanta on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, WGN 9
